summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was provided or inferred. All hydrated refs are open pull requests; no security-sensitive item was detected in the preflight artifact. Close, merge, fix, and raise_pr actions are either blocked by job policy or unsupported by the available evidence, so each PR is kept as an independent maintainer-review item.
